title: Lodge your tax return online with myTax
description: Prepare and lodge your own tax return online. It is the quick, safe and secure way to lodge, most process in 2 weeks.
keywords: mytax, mydeductions, lodge online, tax return, lodge return, online tax

content_blocks.text: Media: A quick demonstration of lodging with myTax https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bd1bdiubo71uum External Link ( Duration: 3:08)

Our online services for individuals is available to access through myGov or the ATO app. You need to create a myGov account and link to the ATO. You can access 'myTax' within the online product, you don't need to download any software.
Using myTax you can lodge your tax return on a computer, smartphone or tablet.

items: We can pre-fill most information from your employers, banks, government agencies, health funds and third parties by late July.
We use a range of systems and controls to protect your information.
It's available 24 hours a day 7 days a week, so you can lodge at your convenience.
You'll get your refund faster, generally within 2 weeks.
You can upload records you keep in the myDeductions tool to pre-fill your tax return.
It is available for all individuals and sole traders who want to lodge their own tax return.
You will receive a lodgment receipt by email to confirm that we have your lodgment.

content_blocks.text: What you can do with myTax

items: lodge a tax return from the 2016 income year onwards
lodge your 2014 and 2015 tax returns, if you're eligible – see lodge a prior year tax return
tell us if you don't need to lodge (also known as a non-lodgment advice or return not necessary) – see lodge a non-lodgment advice
review and print your tax return before or after you lodge
see an estimate and breakdown of your refund or debt (tax owing).

content_blocks.text: You will need a myGov account with an active link to the ATO to access our online services. To lodge your return with myTax:

items: sign in to your myGov account
select ATO from your linked services
select Manage tax returns from the Quick link .

content_blocks.text: You can also login to our online service for individuals using the ATO app.
The due date to lodge your tax return is 31 October and most refunds issue within 2 weeks. If you need help or support to lodge , check if you are eligible.
Watch more videos on how to lodge online using myTax.

How to add and review deductions in myTax External Link
How to complete the business section in myTax External Link
How to use the Depreciation and capital allowances tool in myTax External Link

content_text:
Media: A quick demonstration of lodging with myTax https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bd1bdiubo71uum External Link ( Duration: 3:08)
## Benefits of lodging with myTax
Our online services for individuals is available to access through myGov or the ATO app. You need to create a myGov account and link to the ATO. You can access 'myTax' within the online product, you don't need to download any software.
Using myTax you can lodge your tax return on a computer, smartphone or tablet.
The benefits include:
- We can pre-fill most information from your employers, banks, government agencies, health funds and third parties by late July.
- We use a range of systems and controls to protect your information.
- It's available 24 hours a day 7 days a week, so you can lodge at your convenience.
- You'll get your refund faster, generally within 2 weeks.
- You can upload records you keep in the myDeductions tool to pre-fill your tax return.
- It is available for all individuals and sole traders who want to lodge their own tax return.
- You will receive a lodgment receipt by email to confirm that we have your lodgment.
## What you can do with myTax
With myTax you can:
- lodge a tax return from the 2016 income year onwards
- lodge your 2014 and 2015 tax returns, if you're eligible – see lodge a prior year tax return
- tell us if you don't need to lodge (also known as a non-lodgment advice or return not necessary) – see lodge a non-lodgment advice
- review and print your tax return before or after you lodge
- see an estimate and breakdown of your refund or debt (tax owing).
## Access to myTax
You will need a myGov account with an active link to the ATO to access our online services. To lodge your return with myTax:
- sign in to your myGov account
- select ATO from your linked services
- select Manage tax returns from the Quick link .
You can also login to our online service for individuals using the ATO app.
The due date to lodge your tax return is 31 October and most refunds issue within 2 weeks. If you need help or support to lodge , check if you are eligible.
## How-to videos for myTax
Watch more videos on how to lodge online using myTax.
- How to personalise your return in myTax External Link
- How to add and review deductions in myTax External Link
- How to complete the business section in myTax External Link
- How to use the Depreciation and capital allowances tool in myTax External Link

child_links.title: Pre-filling your online tax return
child_links.description: When you lodge online with myTax, we pre-fill your return with information we already have.

child_links.title: Pre-fill availability
child_links.description: Check if data on government payments, health funds, interest and shares is ready to pre-fill in your 2024–25 tax return.
